summary: Tested Recent Searches feature on homepage. All tests passed: homepage loads correctly, booking form visible with all fields, recent searches section hidden when localStorage empty, section appears after injecting mock data, clicking recent search fills pickup/dropoff fields correctly, arrow icons present in search items.
critical_code_review_comments: Google Maps Autocomplete deprecation warning: As of March 1st, 2025, google.maps.places.Autocomplete is not available to new customers. Consider migrating to google.maps.places.PlaceAutocompleteElement in the future.
seed_data_creation: Injected mock recent searches data into localStorage for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recent Searches feature fully tested and working. localStorage key 'recentSearches' stores array of objects with {pickup, dropoff, pickupCoords: {latitude, longitude}, dropoffCoords: {latitude, longitude}}. Max 3 entries stored. Section only shows when localStorage has data. Clicking a recent search fills pickup/dropoff fields and scrolls to form.
